title: Academic Tutoring Support
content:
MORGAN STATE UNIVERSITY ACADEMIC TUTORING AND SUPPORT

TUTORING SERVICES:

CASA (Center for Academic Success and Achievement)
Location: Tyler Hall 117J (in-person) and Google Meet (online)
Hours: Mondays-Fridays 9 AM - 5 PM
Email: tutoring@morgan.edu
Appointments: https://morgan.navigate.eab.com/

Computer Science Department Tutoring
Location: McMechen Suite 507
Contact: Dr. Roshan Paudel (Roshan.Paudel@morgan.edu, 443-885-3096)

Academic Enrichment Program (AEP)
Phone: 443-885-4452
Email: aeptutor@morgan.edu
Labs:
- Blount Towers Room 150: Sunday-Thursday 4 PM - 12 AM
- Cummings House Room 020: Monday-Saturday 8 AM - 4 PM & 12 AM - 2 AM
- Marble Hall Academic Resource Center: Sunday-Friday 12 PM - 8 PM

Writing Center
Email: writingcenter@morgan.edu
Walk-ins welcome, appointments preferred.
Website: https://www.morgan.edu/writingcenter

CREDIT POLICY:
Maximum 18 credits per semester.
To exceed 18 credits, need 3.0 GPA or higher and submit Excess Credit Request Form.
Standard limit: 21 credits
Absolute maximum: 24 credits with Department Chair approval

REGISTRAR CONTACTS:
Transcripts: transcripts@morgan.edu
Graduation/Diploma: graduation@morgan.edu
Registration: registration@morgan.edu
Records (major changes, GPA): records@morgan.edu
Transfer credits: transfer@morgan.edu
Veterans: veterans@morgan.edu
